name: metabase
description: Official Metabase tooling for Claude Code

plugins.name: metabase-cli
plugins.description: Drive a Metabase instance from the terminal via the `mb` CLI: auth, list/get/create/update/delete on every resource, run queries and transforms, git-sync content to and from a remote. Bundles transform and git-sync references as on-demand skills served by `mb skills get`.
